name: Glacial Paths
description: An instrumental album for piano and synthesizers by Ernesto Cisneros Cino. Ten pieces composed in the space between silence and sound, exploring glacial landscapes through algorithmic and stochastic processes.

name: Glacial Paths | Ernesto Cisneros Cino
